top_signals.title: Oil tankers with 35 million barrels stuck in Persian Gulf exited Strait of Hormuz since Iran deal
top_signals.summary: The jump in oil exports comes as the threat level for ships crossing Hormuz has been downgraded to "moderate."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. crude oil briefly dips below $70 as tankers transit Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s IPO bust clouds equity markets as Chaebol structure restrains listings
top_signals.summary: South Korea's IPO activity has lagged that of its regional peers as the structure of the market and governance reforms collide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
top_signals.summary: The company plans to issue 17.79 million new shares at a value of 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion).
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings: Tax cut on kids’ meals and days out goes live
top_signals.summary: Tax cut on meals and days out come into force.

top_signals.title: a16z CSX-backed Cambrian raises $6 million seed to build blockchain data oracle network
top_signals.summary: Cambrian, a startup building blockchain data infrastructure for institutions and AI agents, raised $6 million in a seed funding round.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wimbledon property market drops ball ahead of Grand Slam
top_signals.summary: Wimbledon’s property market has suffered an unforced error ahead of next month’s Grand Slam, as house prices slip in spite of the world-renowned tournament. Home to the world’s most prestigious tennis tournament, prices in the south-west suburb have fallen by almost 12 per cent over the last year, according to research conducted by independent estate [...]

top_signals.title: Canada Building West’s First Grid-Scale SMR
top_signals.summary: Construction has begun on the Western world’s first grid-scale Small Modular Reactor (SMR), though small is not what comes to mind, considering that the machine will fit on two soccer fields. According to AutoNotion, a 953-tonne slab of steel and concrete was lowered into a 35-meter shaft at Ontario’s Darlington New Nuclear Project site, “ending a decade of talk” about the new nuclear technology and ushering in a period of action. The slab is the base mat of the first BWRX-300 modular plant designed by GE Vernova —…
